title: Ar Rumaythah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ar Rumaythah with a Z-Score of +4.71. This critical event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Ar Rumaythah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Critical Level warning issued. 
 The relative humidity is at 20%, and wind speed is moderate at 16.3 km/h. 
 Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are at 15.5 GG, while Heating Degree Days (HDD) are at 0.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this heat wave.
